/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -DNDEBUG   CMakeFiles/sample.dir/test/test.cc.o  -o sample   -L/home/unitree/argo_go2_ws/src/hesai_ros_driver/src/driver/HesaiLidar_SDK_2.0/./libhesai/PtcClient/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/unitree/argo_go2_ws/src/hesai_ros_driver/src/driver/HesaiLidar_SDK_2.0/./libhesai/PtcClient/lib:/home/unitree/argo_go2_ws/build/hesai_ros_driver/src/driver/HesaiLidar_SDK_2.0/libhesai libhesai/libsource_lib.so libhesai/libcontainer_lib.so libhesai/libptcClient_lib.so libhesai/libserialClient_lib.so libhesai/libptcParser_lib.so libhesai/liblog_lib.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so libhesai/libplatutils_lib.so -lpthread
